'''√l-b-l''' ('''kalabal''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quibble|quibble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quibble|quibble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-b-l
|-
! Lemma
| kalabal
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thilabal || jilabal || shilabal || kilabal
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthulabal || jujulabal || shushulabal || kukulabal
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thulabal || julabal || shulabal || kulabal
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thulabal || julabal || shulabal || kulabal
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thelabal || jelabal || shelabal || kelabal
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thotholabal || jojolabal || shosholabal || kokolabal
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tholabal || jolabal || sholabal || kolabal
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tholabal || jolabal || sholabal || kolabal
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || labal || labal || labal || labal
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || labal || labal || labal || labal
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || labal || labal || labal || labal
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || labal || labal || labal || labal
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thælabal || jælabal || shælabal || kælabal
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathalabal || jajalabal || shashalabal || kakalabal
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thalabal || jalabal || shalabal || kalabal
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thalabal || jalabal || shalabal || kalabal
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shalabal
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshalabal
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishalabal
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shalabalnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshalabalnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishalabalnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shalabalshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshalabalnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishalabalshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shalabalro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshalabalnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishalabalro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shalabalmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshalabalnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishalabalmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shalabalsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshalabalnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishalabalsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shalabalng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshalabalnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishalabalng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shalabalya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshalabalnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishalabalya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shalabalyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshalabalnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishalabalyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shalabalnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshalabalnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishalabalnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shalabalnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalabalnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalabalnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shalabalnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshalabalnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalabalnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shalabalshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshalabalnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishalabalshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shalabalshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalabalnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalabalshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shalabalshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshalabalnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalabalshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shalabalronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshalabalnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishalabalronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shalabalroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshalabalnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishalabalroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shalabalromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshalabalnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalabalromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shalabalmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshalabalnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishalabalmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shalabalmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshalabalnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishalabalmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shalabalmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalabalnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalabalmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
